title: Getting Started with Next.js 14
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to building modern web applications with Next.js 14 and the App Router.
content:
Next.js 14 brings exciting new features like the App Router, Server Components, and improved performance. In this post, we explore how to get started with this powerful framework.

## Why Next.js?

Next.js provides an excellent developer experience with features like file-based routing, server-side rendering, and static site generation out of the box.

## Setting Up

Start by creating a new project with `create-next-app`. The CLI will walk you through the setup process.

## The App Router

The App Router is the new default routing system that uses React Server Components for improved performance and simpler data fetching patterns.

title: Tailwind CSS Best Practices
excerpt: Tips and tricks for writing maintainable and efficient Tailwind CSS code in production applications.
content:
Tailwind CSS has become the go-to CSS framework for modern web development. Here are some best practices to keep your code clean and maintainable.

## Use Design Tokens

Leverage CSS custom properties and Tailwind's configuration to create a consistent design system.

## Component Patterns

Create reusable component patterns with Tailwind to avoid repetition and maintain consistency across your application.

## Responsive Design

Tailwind makes responsive design easy with its mobile-first breakpoint system. Always start with mobile styles and add complexity for larger screens.

title: Advanced TypeScript Patterns
excerpt: Level up your TypeScript skills with advanced patterns for type safety and code organization.
content:
TypeScript offers powerful type system features that can make your code more robust and easier to maintain.

## Generics

Generics allow you to write flexible, reusable code while maintaining type safety.

## Discriminated Unions

Use discriminated unions to create type-safe state machines and API response handling.

## Template Literal Types

Template literal types enable powerful string manipulation at the type level.
